name: @mieweb/test-app
description: A tiny worker that exercises every @mieweb/cloud contract surface (D1, R2, KV, Queues, Durable Objects, Vectorize, AI) over plain HTTP, so the SAME assertions can prove the layer works on every target: cloudflare (wrangler/Miniflare), local (Node host harness), and mieweb/os (libSQL + S3 + Valkey via docker compose).
